query: Before you send that reply, can you double-check it for mistakes?
critique your own answer before finishing — I don't want to catch errors after the fact
review this before you're done, I don't fully trust the first pass
hey can u sanity check what you just wrote and fix anything sketchy before we move on
Don't just hand me the answer — grade it yourself against the requirements and polish it if it falls short.
Build me a self-critique loop that iterates on the output of generate_report() in report_builder.py until it passes quality checks, max 3 iterations.
Design a rubric-based grader for scoring our support-ticket summaries on accuracy, tone, and completeness with weighted dimensions.
Set up an LLM-as-judge system that compares two versions of the same onboarding doc and explains which is better.
We need an evaluator-optimizer pipeline that keeps refining the generated SQL until the test suite in tests/sql/ passes, capped at 5 rounds.
my manager wants the agent to check its own draft for quality and iterate on it automatically instead of me proofreading every time
Can you review this pull request in ~/repos/api-gateway for security issues before I request reviewers?
Write unit tests for the calculate_discount function in pricing.py.
What's your opinion on which cloud provider is better for a small SaaS, AWS or GCP?
Can you proofread this email for typos before I send it to the client?
Can you grade these five student essays against my attached rubric and give each one a score out of 100?
Compare these two marketing taglines and tell me which one is catchier.
Debug why my pytest suite in tests/ keeps failing on the checkout flow.
Summarize the key differences between these two API design proposals for the team wiki.
can u check this code actually compiles, keep getting red squigglies
Improve the readability of this paragraph — it's too dense for a general audience.
